notes: Mouse behaves badly, DRM can be circumvented by copying registry key from windows installation.
title: Take On Helicopters

notes:
I've got a dual boot with Windows 10 on another drive that I use if I absolutely have to, so I logged in there and installed TKOH then went to regedit and exported the key HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\WOW6432Node\bohemia interactive studio.

I then booted back into Linux and opened regedit using Wine - env WINEPREFIX=PATH TO STEAM LIBRARY/steamapps/compatdata/65730/pfx regedit.

i then renamed the registry key Steam had set up and imported my new registry key back in.  I did have to change a couple of paths for the game and expansions as they're in different locations.

After that, the game launched straight away and seems to work as intended.
title: Take On Helicopters
